testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_new

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_greeting_card_create_new.TestEviteGreetingCardCreateNew object at 0x7fec565e1e80> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fec5663d9a0>
def test_evite_greeting_card_create_new(self, config): """ Create Greeting Card as new registered user
:param config: :return: """ _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
login_modal = config.pages['login_modal'] evite_gallery_page = config.pages["evite_gallery_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] evite_greeting_card = config.pages["evite_greeting_card"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_egift_card = config.pages["step2_egift_card"] step3_grc_messages = config.pages["step3_grc_messages"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = (f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
evite_gallery_page.select_mega_nav(action="greeting_cards", url="cards") evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(greeting_card=True)
# step1_template.select_next(url="egift-card") # step2_egift_card.select_egift_card_toggle(toggle=False)

testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event

failure.message: Exception: Can't verify page url contains egift-card, current url: https://test23.evitelabs.com/cards/partyanimalballoons_card/create?v=&c=thankyou_cards&previous=thankyou_cards&page=1&invitation_type=card&category_id=thankyou_cards&pos=11

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event.TestEviteGreetingCardCreateFromPastEvent object at 0x7f86d7771340> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f86d77ce630>
def test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event(self, config): logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
evite_homepage = config.pages["evite_home_page"] page = config.pages["page"]
login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] evite_gallery_page = config.pages["evite_gallery_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_egift_card = config.pages["step2_egift_card"] step3_grc_messages = config.pages["step3_grc_messages"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
sql_string = (f"SELECT user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title FROM public.evite_events WHERE " f"user_email_addr != 'automation_events@evitetest.com' AND " f"env = '{settings.ENV}' AND " f"event_premium = FALSE AND " f"event_draft_guests = FALSE AND " f"event_draft = FALSE AND " f"event_cancelled = FALSE AND " f"created_by = 'evite' AND " # f"event_create_date > now()::DATE AND " # f"event_sent_date < now()::DATE AND " f"event_create_date > '2023-04-01' AND " f"event_sent_date > '2023-04-01' AND " f"event_date < now()::DATE AND " f"event_date > now()::DATE-14 ORDER BY random() LIMIT 1;") # We have Thanks only for 14 days
page.get_url(config.environment, "")
user_email_addr = None user_pass = None user_first_name = None user_last_name = None event_title = None
# DB & API Connections quake_v3_account = QuakeV3Account(inspect.stack()[0][3]) quake_v3_user = QuakeV3User(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) db_connect = psql_db.connect_db()
try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string)
# Check result first, if no data then don't fail: Skip if cursor.rowcount: user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title = cursor.fetchone() else: logger.warn(f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}") config.test_failed["value"] = False pytest.skip("DB have no record for sql")
except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success")
# Check email length if len(user_email_addr) > 59: msg = "Email is 60+ characters" logger.error(msg) pytest.skip(msg)
# Get user's first and last name cursor = None sql_string = psql_db.get_select_from_table_string( settings.DB_TABLE_USERS, ["user_first_name", "user_last_name"], user_email_addr=user_email_addr ) try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string) if cursor.rowcount: user_first_name, user_last_name = cursor.fetchone() else: config.test_failed["value"] = False msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warn(msg) pytest.skip(msg) except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success") finally: db_connect.close() cursor.close()
# Need for payment page self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = f"{user_first_name} {user_last_name}"
# LogIn through the API sign_in_response = quake_v3_account.account_session_sign_in(email_address=user_email_addr, password=user_pass)
# Get All Past Events past_events_response = quake_v3_user.get_past_events( user_id=sign_in_response.json()["message"]["user_id"], session_id=sign_in_response.json()["message"]["token"], )
# Go through the list of events and get one that is not a card or draft event, and hosted by the user past_event = None for event in past_events_response.json()["message"]["events"]: if event["guest_status"] == 1 and event["used_as"] == "invitation": past_event = event logger.info(f"Found a past event: {event['title']}, ID {event['event_id']}") break
# Skip the rest of the test if no qualifying event was found if not past_event: msg = "Could not find a past event with this user." logger.info(f"{msg}") pytest.skip(msg)
# LogIn login_modal.sign_in(email=user_email_addr, password=user_pass) evite_homepage.select_logged_in_menu(action="events")
my_events.select_event_options(event_title=event_title, event_option="send_thanks", event_status="You hosted", url="cards")
evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(greeting_card=True)
> step1_template.select_next(url="egift-card")
_test_name = 'test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f86d77ce630> cursor = <cursor object at 0x7f86d775eb60; closed: -1> db_connect = <connection object at 0x7f86d785e480; dsn: 'user=jenkins password=xxx dbname=qatests host=34.133.6.167 port=5432', closed: 1> event = {'event_id': '02E6UVCLWT4LKYEA2EPQMMZLJ7EOYQ', 'event_is_invite': True, 'guest_id': '02E6UVCLWT4LKYEA2EPQMMZLKUVX4A', 'guest_status': 1, ...} event_title = 'testCIYTSQ123test_20250805-164824' evite_gallery_page = psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7f86d77cc6b0> quake_v3_account = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_account.QuakeV3Account object at 0x7f86d77ce5d0> quake_v3_user = <commons.pages.evite.step2_egift_card.Step2EGiftCard object at 0x7f86d77ce120> step3_grc_messages = <commons.pages.evite.step3_grc_messages.Step3GRCMessages object at 0x7f86d77cdfa0> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7f86d77ce360> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7f86d77ce420> user_email_addr = testcase.name: test_evite_sus_one_day_create

failure.message: Exception: Fail verify name, expecting evite-volunteer-20260120-1744-295965-test, got

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f0dd7cd0da0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f0dd7d19d00>
def test_evite_sus_one_day_create(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] sign_up_sheet_maker = config.pages["sign_up_sheet_maker"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time() if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}")
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sus_event(sus_event="one_day")
sign_up_sheet_maker.enter_details(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.create_sheet_one_day(test_data=self._json_test_data) sign_up_sheet_maker.verify_sheet_sign_ups(test_data=self._json_test_data)
sign_up_sheet_maker.publish_sheet() shareable_link = sign_up_sheet_maker.copy_shareable_link()
login_modal.sign_out()
# Get Volunteer view to build SUS data config.driver.get(shareable_link) logger.info(f"Going volunteer url - {config.driver.current_url}")
sign_up_sheet = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_sign_up_sheet_one_day()
volunteers = sign_up_sheet_maker.initialize_volunteers(volunteers=self._json_test_data["volunteers"])
for volunteer in volunteers:
if volunteer["registered"]: logger.info(f"Registering guest: {volunteer['name']}")
# Change register data self._json_test_data["register"]["first_name"] = volunteer["name"] self._json_test_data["register"]["email"] = volunteer["email_addr"]
# Register login_modal.register(test_data=self._json_test_data['register'], existing_user=True)
sus_row = sign_up_sheet_maker.get_random_sus_row(sus=sign_up_sheet)
sign_up_sheet_maker.select_sign_up(sus_row) > sign_up_sheet_maker.volunteer_sign_up(volunteer=volunteer)
_test_name = 'test_evite_sus_one_day_create' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f0dd7d19d00> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7f0dd7d19970> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_sus_one_day_create (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7f0dd7d19b80> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7f0dd7d19e80> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7f0dd7d18aa0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_sus_one_day_create.TestEviteSUSOneDayCreate object at 0x7f0dd7cd0da0> shareable_link = 'https://test23.evite.me/Hvhmcb8cfK' sign_up_sheet = [{'row_count': 2, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'drinks'}, {'row_count': 5, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'chips'}, {'row_count': 10, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'food'}] sign_up_sheet_maker = <commons.pages.evite.sign_up_sheet_maker.SignUpSheetMaker object at 0x7f0dd7d19910> sus_row = {'row_count': 2, 'row_filled': 0, 'row_title': 'drinks'} user_email_addr = 'evite-01202026-174224-14-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' volunteer = {'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260120-1744-295965-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 2, 'kids_count': 0, ...} volunteers = [{'comment': 'THIS IS A VOLUNTEER COMMENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260120-1744-295965-test@evitetest.com', '...ENT', 'email_addr': 'evite-volunteer-20260120-1744-296168-test@evitetest.com', 'guest_count': 0, 'kids_count': 0, ...}]

def log_and_raise_exception(self, message): """ Uses logger to log exception and then raises Exception error :param message: Message to log and raise :return: """ self.logger.exception(message) > raise Exception(message) E Exception: Fail verify name, expecting evite-volunteer-20260120-1744-295965-test, got

testcase.name: test_evite_copy_premium_past_event

failure.message: selenium.common.exceptions.JavascriptException: Message: javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'click') (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126) Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00380283+25139] (No symbol) [0x0030B234] (No symbol) [0x001E04A3] (No symbol) [0x001E6EA1] (No symbol) [0x001E9203] (No symbol) [0x0026F6C5] (No symbol) [0x0024CF3C] (No symbol) [0x0026E6E1] (No symbol) [0x0024CD36] (No symbol) [0x0021BD29] (No symbol) [0x0021D064] GetHandleVerifier [0x0068B143+3215603] GetHandleVerifier [0x006A22BA+3310186] GetHandleVerifier [0x0069C4D2+3286146] GetHandleVerifier [0x00419C80+654384] (No symbol) [0x003145BD] (No symbol) [0x003114A8] (No symbol) [0x00311647] (No symbol) [0x00303D20] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75D75D49+25] RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7706CEBB+107] RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7706CE41+561]

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_copy_premium_past_event.TestEviteCopyPremiumPastEvent object at 0x7f2b66f58500> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f2b66fb9190>
def test_evite_copy_premium_past_event(self, config): """ Copy premium past event: Select past event from DB Copy Change title, time, etc Update and Delete guest list, then update total guest list Send event Verify
:param config: :return: """
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3])
logger.info(f"Start {inspect.stack()[0][3]}")
page = config.pages["page"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"] evite_event_page = config.pages["evite_event_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
page.get_url(config.environment, "")
user_email_addr = "" user_pass = "" user_first_name = "" user_last_name = "" event_title = "" cursor = None
# Get event with event_date > 2023-04-01 which is fabric
psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3]) db_connect = psql_db.connect_db()
if self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"]: user_email_addr = self._json_test_data["sign_in"]["email"] user_pass = self._json_test_data["sign_in_credentials"]["password"] else: sql_string = ( "SELECT %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s FROM %s WHERE event_create_date > '%s' " "AND event_sent_date > '%s'" "AND env = '%s' " "AND event_cancelled = '%s' " "AND event_premium = '%s' " "AND event_draft = '%s' " "AND event_draft_guests = '%s' " "AND created_by = '%s'" "ORDER BY random() LIMIT %s;" % ( "user_email_addr", "user_pass", "event_title", "event_id", "event_date", "event_premium", settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, "2023-04-01", "2023-04-01", settings.ENV, False, True, False, False, "evite", 1, ) )
try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string)
# Check result first, if no data then don't fail: Skip if cursor.rowcount: user_email_addr, user_pass, event_title, event_id, event_date, event_premium = cursor.fetchone() else: msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warn(msg) pytest.skip(msg)
except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success")
# Log in with fetched user
# Log in with fetched user login_modal.sign_in(email=user_email_addr, password=user_pass)
# Get user's first and last name sql_string = psql_db.get_select_from_table_string( settings.DB_TABLE_USERS, ["user_first_name", "user_last_name"], user_email_addr=user_email_addr ) try: cursor = db_connect.cursor() cursor.execute(sql_string) if cursor.rowcount: user_first_name, user_last_name = cursor.fetchone() else: config.test_failed["value"] = False msg = f"DB have no record for sql: {sql_string}" logger.warn(msg) pytest.skip(msg) except psycopg2.DatabaseError as db_error: logger.error(f"Unable to execute sql: , {sql_string}, {db_error}") else: logger.info("SQL execute success") finally: db_connect.close() cursor.close()
evite_home_page.select_logged_in_menu(action="events")
# First verify event, we have bad data in db if not my_events.find_event(event_title=event_title, fail=False): # There is a mismatch between event and host, delete the row sql_string = "DELETE FROM %s WHERE user_email_addr = '%s';" % (settings.DB_TABLE_EVENTS, user_email_addr) psql_db.db_execute(sql_string)
config.test_failed["value"] = False pytest.skip(f"Can't find event {event_title}")

def check_response(self, response: dict[str, Any]) -> None: """Checks that a JSON response from the WebDriver does not have an error.
:Args: - response - The JSON response from the WebDriver server as a dictionary object.
:Raises: If the response contains an error message. """ status = response.get("status", None) if not status or status == ErrorCode.SUCCESS: return value = None message = response.get("message", "") screen: str = response.get("screen", "") stacktrace = None if isinstance(status, int): value_json = response.get("value", None) if value_json and isinstance(value_json, str): try: value = json.loads(value_json) if isinstance(value, dict): if len(value) == 1: value = value["value"] status = value.get("error", None) if not status: status = value.get("status", ErrorCode.UNKNOWN_ERROR) message = value.get("value") or value.get("message") if not isinstance(message, str): value = message message = message.get("message") else: message = value.get("message", None) except ValueError: pass
exception_class: type[WebDriverException] e = ErrorCode() error_codes = [item for item in dir(e) if not item.startswith("__")] for error_code in error_codes: error_info = getattr(ErrorCode, error_code) if isinstance(error_info, list) and status in error_info: exception_class = getattr(ExceptionMapping, error_code, WebDriverException) break else: exception_class = WebDriverException
if not value: value = response["value"] if isinstance(value, str): raise exception_class(value) if message == "" and "message" in value: message = value["message"]
screen = None # type: ignore[assignment] if "screen" in value: screen = value["screen"]
stacktrace = None st_value = value.get("stackTrace") or value.get("stacktrace") if st_value: if isinstance(st_value, str): stacktrace = st_value.split("\n") else: stacktrace = [] try: for frame in st_value: line = frame.get("lineNumber", "") file = frame.get("fileName", "<anonymous>") if line: file = f"{file}:{line}" meth = frame.get("methodName", "<anonymous>") if "className" in frame: meth = f"{frame['className']}.{meth}" msg = " at %s (%s)" msg = msg % (meth, file) stacktrace.append(msg) except TypeError: pass if exception_class == UnexpectedAlertPresentException: alert_text = None if "data" in value: alert_text = value["data"].get("text") elif "alert" in value: alert_text = value["alert"].get("text") raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace, alert_text) # type: ignore[call-arg] # mypy is not smart enough here > raise exception_class(message, screen, stacktrace) E selenium.common.exceptions.JavascriptException: Message: javascript error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'click') E (Session info: chrome=133.0.6943.126) E Stacktrace: E GetHandleVerifier [0x00380283+25139] E (No symbol) [0x0030B234] E (No symbol) [0x001E04A3] E (No symbol) [0x001E6EA1] E (No symbol) [0x001E9203] E (No symbol) [0x0026F6C5] E (No symbol) [0x0024CF3C] E (No symbol) [0x0026E6E1] E (No symbol) [0x0024CD36] E (No symbol) [0x0021BD29] E (No symbol) [0x0021D064] E GetHandleVerifier [0x0068B143+3215603] E GetHandleVerifier [0x006A22BA+3310186] E GetHandleVerifier [0x0069C4D2+3286146] E GetHandleVerifier [0x00419C80+654384] E (No symbol) [0x003145BD] E (No symbol) [0x003114A8] E (No symbol) [0x00311647] E (No symbol) [0x00303D20] E BaseThreadInitThunk [0x75D75D49+25] E RtlInitializeExceptionChain [0x7706CEBB+107] E RtlGetAppContainerNamedObjectPath [0x7706CE41+561]
